pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the target Java version from 11 to 17 to align with the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to JDK 17; without this change, the compiler plugin would target JDK 11, failing to utilize or enforce JDK 17 language features and bytecode compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Jackson library version to 2.13.3 to ensure compatibility with JDK 17 and Spring Boot 2.2+.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Jackson versions may have runtime issues or lack support for newer JDK module structures; upgrading ensures stability on JDK 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Spring Boot version to 2.2.13.RELEASE to support JDK 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.1.x has limited or no support for JDK 17; upgrading is required to run the application on the new JDK.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven Surefire plugin to 3.0.0-M7 to support JDK 17 test execution.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Surefire versions (e.g., 2.22.1) often fail to execute tests on JDK 17 due to module system restrictions or internal API changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven Compiler plugin to 3.10.1 to support JDK 17 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugins may not correctly handle the `--release` flag or JDK 17 specific bytecode generation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update ASM library to 9.3 to support JDK 17 bytecode.
pom.xml.why_exists: ASM 7.0 does not support JDK 17 bytecode version (61); using an older version causes runtime errors when analyzing or transforming JDK 17 classes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update AspectJ tools to 1.9.8 to support JDK 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older AspectJ versions may fail to weave or compile aspects on JDK 17 due to internal API changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Hibernate to 5.6.4.Final to support JDK 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Hibernate versions may have compatibility issues with JDK 17 module system or bytecode enhancements.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update HikariCP to 5.0.1 to support JDK 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: HikariCP 5.x is required for full JDK 17 compatibility and performance improvements.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update PostgreSQL driver to 42.5.0 to support JDK 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older PostgreSQL drivers may have issues with JDK 17 SSL or module access.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update JUnit Jupiter to 5.8.2 to support JDK 17 testing.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JUnit 5 versions may have issues running on JDK 17 due to module restrictions.
